instruction: Write an HTML5 head section with charset utf-8, a viewport meta tag, and a descriptive title. The body may be empty.
code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Inventory overview</title>
  </head>
  <body></body>
</html>
